items.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
items.description: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.

items.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
items.description: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.

items.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
items.description: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Partner Network
items.description: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.

items.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
items.description: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.description: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.description: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.

items.title: 5 ways Google Search can level up your thrift and vintage shopping
items.description: Uncover second-hand scores with AI tools in Google Search and Shopping.
